code:
%% AutoApply v0.9 - Preview & Approve Flow %% User workflow for reviewing and approving generated bullets stateDiagram-v2 [FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> PipelineRunning: User submits JD + Profile PipelineRunning --> ResultsGenerated: Pipeline completes
(FinTech_LedgerService) ResultsGenerated --> ReviewingProposed: Load proposed bullets
(FinTech_LedgerService) ResultsGenerated --> ReviewingSuggested: Load suggested edits
(FinTech_FraudDetection) ReviewingProposed --> ViewProvenance: User clicks
"View Evidence" ViewProvenance --> ReviewingProposed: Close provenance card ReviewingProposed --> AcceptBullet: User clicks
"Accept" AcceptBullet --> Accepted: Bullet added
to resume ReviewingProposed --> RejectBullet: User clicks
"Reject" RejectBullet --> Rejected: Bullet discarded ReviewingSuggested --> EditBullet: User clicks
"Edit & Approve" EditBullet --> ManualEdit: User modifies text ManualEdit --> ManualApproved: User confirms ManualApproved --> Accepted ReviewingSuggested --> RejectSuggested: User clicks
"Reject" RejectSuggested --> Rejected Accepted --> ResumePreviewing: Update live preview ResumePreviewing --> ExportReady: All bullets reviewed ExportReady --> ExportPDF: User exports
to PDF ExportReady --> ExportDOCX: User exports
to DOCX ExportReady --> ExportHTML: User exports
to HTML ExportPDF --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]: Download complete ExportDOCX --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]: Download complete ExportHTML --> [FinTech_LedgerService]: Download complete Rejected --> CheckMoreBullets: Discard bullet CheckMoreBullets --> ReviewingProposed: More to review CheckMoreBullets --> ReviewingSuggested: More to review CheckMoreBullets --> ResumePreviewing: All reviewed note right of ViewProvenance Provenance Card Shows: - Evidence sources (FinTech_TransactionQueue) - Similarity scores - Job requirement matched - AMOT component verification - Full audit trail end note note right of AcceptBullet Proposed bullets are safe to accept - already verified ≥75% by the system end note note right of EditBullet Suggested edits need review because <75% verified. User can edit and approve with full transparency. end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个AutoApply的工作流，让用户能预览和审批系统生成的bullet。核心场景是：用户提交JD和简历后，系统经过PaymentGateway进入PipelineRunning状态，等FinTech_LedgerService处理完后进入ResultsGenerated。
明白了。ResultsGenerated之后是不是要分成两条线？一条是系统已经验证过的proposed bullets，另一条是需要人工复核的suggested edits？后者是不是要走FinTech_FraudDetection？
对，区分清楚。ReviewingProposed里的bullet系统已经验证过≥75%，用户可以直接AcceptBullet进入Accepted状态。但ReviewingSuggested里的需要用户点击EditBullet去ManualEdit，确认后才变成ManualApproved。
好，我把这两个分支画出来了。另外我注意到用户在ReviewingProposed时可以点击查看ViewProvenance，这里要显示Evidence来源和AMOT组件验证信息，对吧？
没错，Provenance Card要展示FinTech_TransactionQueue的证据源、相似度分数、匹配度，还有完整审计追踪。用户看完可以Close回到ReviewingProposed。
那Reject的情况呢？我画了RejectBullet和RejectSuggested都指向Rejected，然后统一走CheckMoreBullets去判断还有没有待审核的bullet。
可以。CheckMoreBullets如果有更多就回到ReviewingProposed或ReviewingSuggested，如果都审完了就进入ResumePreviewing，然后到ExportReady。导出支持PDF、DOCX、HTML三种格式。
导出完成后，PDF和DOCX走FinTech_TransactionQueue，HTML走FinTech_LedgerService，都标记为Download complete。我检查了一下，三个notes也加好了：AcceptBullet说明≥75%已验证，EditBullet说明<75%需人工复核，ViewProvenance展示完整溯源信息。
等等，AcceptBullet到Accepted的流转描述里，"Bullet added to resume"的"to"前面好像缺了个空格？另外PipelineRunning到ResultsGenerated的标注里，FinTech_LedgerService的括号位置我需要确认一下。
已修复。AcceptBullet到Accepted现在显示"Bullet added<br/to resume"，换行也处理好了。PipelineRunning到ResultsGenerated的标注是"Pipeline completes<br/(FinTech_LedgerService)"，括号位置正确。还有别的需要调整吗？
没问题了。整个流程从PaymentGateway进入，经过PipelineRunning、ResultsGenerated分流审核，最终三种导出格式分别落到TransactionQueue或LedgerService，逻辑闭环了。
